subtasks.description: Evaluate whether engineer u_7732's attempted production hotfix deployment to prod-us-east-1 at 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday complies with maintenance window policy and change governance rules. Assess risk level and determine if exception approval is required.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask (mid tier) because the query explicitly requests governance evaluation against deployment and maintenance window policies. This is a compliance decision requiring policy registry lookup and risk assessment. Mid tier is appropriate because it requires multi-signal policy reasoning (time-based rule + change governance rules + exception evaluation), not just a simple single-rule lookup.

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 meets role requirements (POL-401) but deployment occurs outside approved maintenance window (Tuesday 02:15 UTC vs. approved Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC). CAB approval required per POL-402 for out-of-window production deployments.
applied_constraints: Deployment blocked until Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval obtained
Hotfix must be documented with business justification for emergency deployment
Post-deployment validation and monitoring must be logged
